channel.title: The International Cross-Institute Laboratory for Brain Research

item.title: Home
item.content:encoded:
The International Cross-Institute Laboratory for Brain Research

Department of [Department], [University/Institute]

[INSERT LAB GROUP PHOTO HERE]
In Publii, add an Image block here.

Quick Links

  • Email: [lab@email]
  • Google Scholar: [link]
  • GitHub: [link]
  • ORCID: [link]

About the Lab

[Write 4–6 lines explaining what the lab studies, why it matters, and your approach. Example: “We study how the brain supports … using … to understand …”.]

Research Themes

1) [Theme title 1]

  • Question: [one sentence]
  • Approach: [methods]
  • Keywords: [k1, k2, k3]

2) [Theme title 2]

  • Question: [one sentence]
  • Approach: [methods]
  • Keywords: [k1, k2, k3]

3) [Theme title 3]

  • Question: [one sentence]
  • Approach: [methods]
  • Keywords: [k1, k2, k3]

Latest News

  • [Month Year] — [news item]
  • [Month Year] — [news item]
  • [Month Year] — [news item]

Tip: you can later switch this to Posts tagged “news”.

Selected Publications

  1. [Paper title] — [Authors] — [Venue] ([Year]) — [PDF] [Code] [DOI]
  2. [Paper title] — [Authors] — [Venue] ([Year]) — [PDF] [Code] [DOI]
  3. [Paper title] — [Authors] — [Venue] ([Year]) — [PDF] [Code] [DOI]

See the full list on the Publications page.

Open Positions

  • [Role] — [1 line] — Apply: [email/link]

item.title: Join the Lab
item.content:encoded:
Join the Lab

We welcome applications from [PhD / MSc / Postdocs / RAs] interested in:

  • [topic 1]
  • [topic 2]
  • [topic 3]

Open Positions

[Position title]
Start: [date/rolling]
Summary: [2–3 lines]
Apply: email [email] with subject Prospective [role] — [Your Name]

[INSERT OPTIONAL OPEN POSITION PDF HERE]
In Publii, insert a File link here.

How to Apply

  1. CV
  2. Short statement of interests (½–1 page)
  3. Writing/code sample (optional)
  4. Referees (if relevant)

What we value

  • [skill/quality]
  • [skill/quality]
  • [skill/quality]

For prospective students

Recommended background: [courses/skills]
Funding: [how it works]
Start dates: [typical schedule]
